CROSS-DEFENDANTS RENE PEREZ JR AND KATE HEIDI WEXELL ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW LENT IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ JR, RENE WEXELL, KATE HEIDE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LENT, MATTHEW $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LENT, MATTHEW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PEREZ JR, RENE WEXELL, KATE HEIDE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
